title: Public cost-ledger renderer for funded cycles (spend vs. cap; 0 over-cap) — funded-lane demo
context: ATLTUAE is donated-lane by default, but funded cycles are allowed with a hard per-cycle cap and a public cost ledger. This M4 task is the funded-lane demo (lane: funded, carrying fundedBudgetUsd) that renders a public cost ledger reconciling per-cycle USD spend against the hard cap with 0 over-cap cycles and no secrets in the ledger. The concrete USD cap is a governance decision; the demo cap here is a conservative placeholder to be ratified.
objective: Implement the public cost-ledger renderer for funded cycles: render per-cycle USD spend vs. the hard cap, reconciled against the budget governor, with 0 over-cap cycles and no secrets/credentials in the ledger; this task runs in the funded lane via packages/runner under a hard fundedBudgetUsd cap.
acceptanceCriteria: For funded cycles, renders a public cost ledger: per-cycle USD spend vs. the hard cap, reconciled against the budget governor; 0 over-cap cycles
No secrets/credentials appear in the ledger or any committed artifact
Runs in the funded lane only via packages/runner under the declared hard fundedBudgetUsd cap (never exceeding escrow)
Reviewed and signed off by the gate reviewer + maintainer (recorded)
